5 |     let x = foo;
  |             ^^^ not found in this scope

   |            ---   ^^^^^^^ expected `i32`, found `&str`

 --> src/main.rs:15:9

15|     let z = 42;

error: aborting due to 2 previous errors; 1 warning emitted
